name: mdeditor
description: Editor e viewer Markdown con preview in tempo reale, temi chiaro/scuro, supporto tabelle, emoji e icone Font Awesome.
author: Diego Pianarosa

scripts.publish:win: dotnet publish MDEditor.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 -o ./publish/win-x64 --self-contained true
scripts.publish:linux: dotnet publish MDEditor.csproj -c Release -r linux-x64 -o ./publish/linux-x64 --self-contained true
scripts.clean: dotnet clean MDEditor.csproj && rm -rf publish bin obj
